drops.title: Texas Dino Ribs + Beef Loaded Tater Tots

details: 3 slices (100g) of smoked Texas Dino Ribs on mash — soft and juicy (S$20 on the stall menu)
Full event-special portion of Beef Loaded Tater Tots (S$18 on the stall menu)
Pre-order here, skip the queue at Sentosa GrillFest. When it's gone, it's gone.
